retrieved_result: Sussex, Wisconsin Sussex, Wisconsin Sussex is a village in Waukesha County, Wisconsin. Sussex is located approx. 19 miles northwest of the City of Milwaukee and is part of the Milwaukee metropolitan area. The village comprises 7.77 square miles and has a population of 10,623. Welcome to Sussex!Parks, Facilities & Ame
